description_long: This kiosk features a sleek, modern design with a digital touchscreen display mounted at an ergonomic angle atop a sturdy cylindrical pedestal. The display appears to be encased in a robust, black housing with rounded edges, likely made of metal or high-grade plastic for durability. The pedestal is a single, solid column that connects the display to a wide, circular base, providing stability and resistance to tipping. The base is substantial and flat, ensuring the kiosk remains upright even in high-traffic urban environments. The digital screen is the primary interactive element, likely used for information, ticketing, or wayfinding in public spaces. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and functional, with a focus on user accessibility and durability.
description: A modern, freestanding kiosk with a digital touchscreen display mounted on a sturdy black pedestal and circular base. The design is sleek, minimalist, and built for durability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Angled side view showing the touchscreen display and the full height of the pedestal and base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the display housing and the cylindrical pedestal.
description_view_2: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 0, showing the display and pedestal from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view clearly displaying the digital touchscreen interface and the supporting pedestal.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the front of the kiosk; visible interface with icons and text
attribute_roof_design: flat, integrated with the display housing, no overhangs or decorative elements
